title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hindustan Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hindustan Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
